description: You are a digital archivist processing raw capture files from 1990s VHS tapes located in /home/ga/Videos/vhs_raw/. For the three videos (tape_1992_grad.mkv, tape_1994_picnic.mkv, and tape_1995_storm.mkv), generate access copies in /home/ga/Videos/archive_access/ using the prefix access_ and the MP4 container. Each processed file must be deinterlaced, have its audio downmixed to mono, and be cropped to remove edge noise (Left: 10px, Right: 10px, Top: 4px, Bottom: 12px). Use H.264 for video and AAC for audio, preserving the original duration. Additionally, embed the specific title_tag for each file from /home/ga/Documents/archive_catalog.csv into the MP4 metadata Title field. Do not overwrite the original files.
